patches.summary: synlynk join (new member onboarding: devlog seed from git history, AI context file regeneration, team digest), synlynk team status (active members, story assignments, token budgets), synlynk decide (multi-agent consensus panel with signed Decision records), pull-before-write arbitration, --tokens flag on story create; 390 tests

Install hardening: installed binary now embeds synlynk/ package so it works outside the source repo. --docs-dir flag on init for repos with non-standard doc locations. Smart init migration: detects existing docs and migrates rather than overwriting with blank templates

Scoped dispatch context (task-level instead of full devlog), ## Relevant Files injection from source-map, ## How to Verify contract per dispatch, per-agent framing (Codex/AGY/Claude), Ed25519 capability rating signing, anti-gaming quality cap (test_count<3 capped at 5.0), synlynk/ package split; 365 tests

Maintainer archetype #1 — 5 signal collectors (failing tests, flaky tests, coverage gaps, stale deps, open issues), 7/30-day dedup, foreground investigation, GH issue filing, draft fix PRs; .agents/ config system
Language-agnostic source scanner injects ## Source Architecture into every exec context; passive git-HEAD cache; synlynk scan CLI; dual storage (SQLite source_symbols + source-map.md); 316 tests
VERSION synced to GitHub releases (was stuck at 0.4.x); instruction reach (7 IDE targets, SHA manifest, drift detection); task status model (5 states); AGY replaces Gemini CLI throughout
Model version tier-2 probe, synlynk pr check, synlynk score attest, verifier pipeline capture, Tokq org_domain_tags capability dimension
SQLite WAL state.db, model-aware routing, 3D domain taxonomy, quality signal hierarchy, synlynk story/score CLI
Task status model: 5 states (active/done/deferred/superseded/absorbed), deferred tasks in context, checkpoint archives all resolved states, agent template updates
Instruction reach to Cursor/Copilot/Windsurf, SHA manifest, runtime drift detection, synlynk instructions CLI, DB_PATH centralised to ~/.synlynk/projects/
Agent discovery, dispatch, job store, init wizard with Magic Moments, run --trio
Sentinel hardening, token scraping restored, burn rate, E2E test suite
Polyglot agent files (AGENTS.md), parametric init flags, _build_templates() refactor
gh CLI identity resolution, upgrade check via gh API
Token extraction correctness, test suite reliability
Initial kernel: context injection, cost tracking, telemetry, flatline detection, budget enforcement
Single-file CLI skeleton, exec wrapper, basic context injection
